# How to Maximize Marketing ROI in a Recession - Iterable

## How to Maximize Marketing ROI in a Recession

From incomes to debts, assets to expenses, there are elements of personal finance we all understand. Under economic uncertainty we seek to maximize these elements to be financially stable now and set ourselves up for massive growth in the long run.In this guide, we walk you through how to adopt financial principles to your marketing strategies, ultimately recession-proofing your marketing and maximizing ROI.

In this guide, we walk you through how to adopt financial principles to your marketing strategies, ultimately recession-proofing your marketing and maximizing ROI.

**You’ll learn**:

*   How to build a technology foundation that can scale with you
*   What it takes to harmonize your data and cross-channel strategies for better customer experiences
*   How to reframe your mindset entering economic uncertainty to better achieve your financial goals
